summary: Adjusted the opening and closing handoffs so Chapter 3 carries more cleanly from Chapter 2's divorce-packet image and points more directly into Chapter 4's body-positioning ritual, while leaving the chapter's beats and meaning intact.
edits: Reframed the opening around the divorce packet moving from the sugar bowl to the soy sauce bottle for stronger carryover from Chapter 2.
Removed a duplicate early mention of the divorce packet after moving that image into the opening paragraph.
Tightened the final sentence so the school-issued route logic hands off more directly into Nita's Claude Atlantic morning.
